heading: Authorization of appropriations for dairy farmer indemnities
label: 4552 Authorization of appropriations for dairy farmer indemnities
text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this subchapter.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 450k of this titleSection was enacted as part of , and not as part of the Dairy Production Stabilization Act of 1983 which comprises this chapter.Pub. L. 90–484
